prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura. Extreme close-up of her eye and half of her face, gaze slightly lowered to the right, eyelashes almost motionless, lips pressed with the slightest downward tension, the faint scar on the side of her neck catching a thin side light for an instant, her emotion frozen rather than broken. Background fully dissolved into mixed cool and warm bokeh, the world receding into abstract light, only her judgment remaining. Low-saturation warm-cool contrast, restrained aristocratic interior mood, cinematic realism, ultra-detailed skin texture, shallow depth of field, static frame, tense psychological drama.
